---
title: ""
page-layout: full
description: "Data science, analytics, and AI solutions"
image: logo/codactics.png
---

<div class="hero-wrap">
  <video class="hero-image" autoplay muted loop playsinline>
    <source src="logo/banner.mp4" type="video/mp4">
  </video>
  <p class="coming-soon">The countdown has begun. We’re going live soon.</p>
  <p class="follow-us">
    Follow us on Facebook and Instagram for more:
    <a class="social-link" href="https://www.facebook.com/Codactics" aria-label="Follow Codactics on Facebook">
      <i class="bi bi-facebook"></i>
    </a>
    <a class="social-link" href="https://www.instagram.com/codactics" aria-label="Follow Codactics on Instagram">
      <i class="bi bi-instagram"></i>
    </a>
  </p>
</div>
